message:
feat(abi): promote mntent/fstab/ttyent/ether/signal families from host delegation to native

Replace 18 host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- mntent (4): setmntent/getmntent/endmntent/getmntent_r — BufReader-backed MntStream
- fstab (5): setfsent/getfsent/getfsfile/getfsspec/endfsent — /etc/fstab parser
- ttyent (4): setttyent/getttyent/getttynam/endttyent — /etc/ttys parser
- ether (3): ether_ntohost/ether_hostton/ether_line — /etc/ethers parser
- signal (2): sigpause (raw syscall), sigstack (sigaltstack translation)

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 57 → 39

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
